title: Quality Result
description: Phase 3 Quality Gate output for an Engine Run. Aggregates the four checks (typecheck / route-scan / build-status / policy-compliance) into a single status the Repair Pipeline can act on. ADR 0013 deferred this schema until Sprint 3+; ADR 0017 + Sprint 3C-lite ship it now to close the contract gap. The shape mirrors packages.generation.quality_gate.QualityResult; tests/test_artefact_schema_drift.py locks the two against drift.

status.description: Aggregate status across all four checks. Rules: ok when every check is ok or skipped; failed when typecheck or build-status failed (blocking); degraded when only soft checks (route-scan / policy-compliance) failed.

checks.description: Per-check results in the order Quality Gate ran them. Sprint 3A v1 ships exactly four checks; future sprints (e.g. Page Quality Traits in 3C-full) may extend the enum without breaking the schema's array-of-CheckResult shape.

summary.description: Short one-line operator summary that trace.ndjson can surface without rendering the full check list.

name.description: Canonical check name. Locked by ADR 0015; adding a name here requires bumping the schema and the QualityResult Pydantic Literal at the same time.

status.description: Per-check status. skipped means the check could not run (e.g. typecheck without node_modules); not a substitute for failed.

detail.description: Short human-readable summary for operators reading quality-result.json.

findings.description: Specific issues (missing routes, tsc errors, forbidden file paths). Repair Pipeline filters these against the Fix Registry to dispatch mechanical fixes.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration the check took. Zero for skipped checks.
